problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity — specifically Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
